allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Client } = require\('pg'\); const c = new Client\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\) => c.query\('SELECT current_database\(\), count\(*\) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=\\'public\\''\).then\(r => { console.log\('DB:', r.rows[0]\); c.end\(\); }\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('CONNECT FAIL:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Client } = require\('pg'\); const c = new Client\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\) => c.query\('SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname=\\'public\\' ORDER BY tablename'\).then\(r => { console.log\('Tables:', r.rows.map\(r=>r.tablename\)\); c.end\(\); }\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/dotenv/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', pkg.version, 'main:', pkg.main, 'exports:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.exports, null, 2\).slice\(0, 500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js'; const txt=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); const idx=txt.indexOf\('prisma-engines'\); console.log\(txt.slice\(Math.max\(0,idx-100\), idx+200\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/about.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({history_sample: d.history.milestones?.[0], governance_sample: {intro_type: typeof d.governance.intro, keys: Object.keys\(d.governance\)}}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/about.json'\); const a=d.attributes; console.log\('intro_type:', typeof a.intro, '| last item id:', a.items[a.items.length-1].id\)")
